content:
A shorts styled explanation of the Chaos Realm mechanics! <:Ramona_duel:1356053112292511815> 
https://www.youtube.com/shorts/2YzS0C_TT_A

embeds.title: Morimens: Chaos Explained #morimens #animehorrorgame #lovecraftianh...
embeds.description:
A 3 minute overview of the core mechanics of the Chaos Realm in Morimens.

It may be the tutorial realm, but don't discount it! It has surprisingly powerful passive effects! I can't wait to see the 'Divine' variant.

You can see that I resisted the urge to use Kathigu-Ra here! Who is your favorite C
